column2: In your Google Sheet (the CRM sheet), go to Extensions > Apps Script
Delete any existing code and paste the code from cell B7 below
Save the project and name it 'WILD Email Automation'
Set up a trigger: Edit > Current project's triggers > Add Trigger > sendEmailSequence > From spreadsheet > On form submit
When Google Form submits to this sheet, it auto-triggers the email sequence

After pasting the code:
1. Click the clock icon (Triggers) in Apps Script
2. Add Trigger #1: sendEmailSequence > From spreadsheet > On form submit
3. Add Trigger #2: dailyEmailCheck > Time-driven > Day timer > 9am-10am
4. This means: new signups get Email 01 instantly, and the daily check sends Email 02/03 on schedule
